active_execution_packages.name: WO#12 product scope turn to analysis-grade recommendations
active_execution_packages.notes: User-approved scope change: W2 core product is multi-factor analysis and match screening with ANALYSIS_PICK, not a claim of guaranteed profit or stable market-beating edge. RECOMMEND remains reserved for a separate +EV proof path and analysis cards keep candidate/formal flags false.

active_execution_packages.name: Release Train 3A-R1 staging retry deployment
active_execution_packages.notes: Target revision 2d80e04 deployed without migration. Scheduler health contract failed with FUTURE_REFRESH_POLICY_INVALID because the policy file was unavailable through staging config mount; rollback to 23c89be completed and health passed.

active_execution_packages.name: Release Train 3A-R1 scheduler enablement repair
active_execution_packages.notes: Static scheduler enablement repair passed CI, but staging retry failed because scheduler could not load future-refresh policy from mounted config; rollback completed.

active_execution_packages.name: Release Train 3A future-refresh hardening staging deployment
active_execution_packages.notes: Release Train 3A target deployment rolled back because scheduler dispatch was disabled. R1 static repair now wires staging scheduler future-refresh enablement and is pending retry deployment after CI.

active_execution_packages.name: Gate3 closure decision reconciliation
active_execution_packages.notes: Baselight PASS_LIMITED_WALK_FORWARD resolves historical AH blockers; Gate3 remains PARTIAL due retained DATE-only, phase, OU, 1X2, and export/retention limitations.

active_execution_packages.name: Stage7I-R1B2
active_execution_packages.notes: successor observer completed 24h, but lifecycle collector gap makes the run non-qualifying for Gate5

active_execution_packages.name: future-refresh hardening
active_execution_packages.notes: not deployed to staging to preserve active Stage7I revision continuity

active_execution_packages.name: Gate3 market baseline closure audit
active_execution_packages.notes: Audit separates Stage6 implementation completion from Gate3 production closure.

active_execution_packages.name: Gate3 historical market evidence build
active_execution_packages.notes: Internal assets normalized; no usable settled historical AH data found.

active_execution_packages.name: Gate3 external historical odds source decision
active_execution_packages.notes: Original public-only source decision no longer waits for user decision; Baselight MCP limited AH walk-forward has since provided supplemental historical AH evidence while Gate3 remains PARTIAL due retained limitations.

active_execution_packages.name: Gate3 Baselight minimal acceptance (corrected)
active_execution_packages.notes: API-Sports local JSON was audited, not Baselight data. Settlement logic PASS (55/55), but source mismatch means Baselight was NOT_EVALUATED_SOURCE_MISMATCH. Gate3 remains PARTIAL.

active_execution_packages.name: Gate3 Baselight AI schema probe intake
active_execution_packages.notes: User-provided Baselight AI schema/coverage evidence; no full data download or backtest. Gate3 remains PARTIAL.

active_execution_packages.name: Gate3 Baselight limited AH extract and walk-forward
active_execution_packages.notes: Baselight MCP odds-date-window sample reached 502 fixtures and AH walk-forward passed; Gate3 remains PARTIAL due DATE-only/phase/export limitations.

active_execution_packages.name: Release Train 3A-R2A policy mount static repair
active_execution_packages.notes: Adds read-only /app/config/policies submount for staging worker and scheduler so the versioned future-refresh policy is available despite the shared /app/config mount. No deployment or migration in R2A.

active_execution_packages.name: Release Train 3A-R2B staging retry deployment
active_execution_packages.notes: Target revision 371a9cb deployed without migration. Policy mount contract passed and scheduler auto-dispatched one task, but worker failed with PermissionError before writing task audit; rollback to 23c89be completed and health passed.

active_execution_packages.name: Release Train 3A-R3A canonical runtime mount repair
active_execution_packages.notes: Standalone staging runtime source changed from infra/compose/runtime to release-root ../../runtime so the container mount resolves through the release runtime symlink to /opt/w2/shared/runtime. Worker healthcheck now verifies runtime writability without writing files.

active_execution_packages.name: Release Train 3A-R3B staging retry deployment
active_execution_packages.notes: Target revision 5e1179f deployed without migration. Worker pre-dispatch contract showed /app/runtime resolves to /opt/w2/shared/runtime but is not writable for non-root uid 10001; target scheduler was not started, no provider call was made, and rollback to 23c89be completed.
